prompt: What is something I've never forgiven myself for, and what steps can I take to work towards forgiveness?
How do I handle rejection, and what does this say about my self-worth?
When I think about my future, what fears come up most frequently?
What part of myself am I most ashamed of, and how can I learn to accept it?
How do I sabotage my own success, and why might I be doing this?
Which of my personality traits do I try to hide from others, and what would happen if I didn't?
In which areas of my life do I feel powerless, and what can I do to reclaim my power?
What grudges am I holding onto, and how are they serving me?
How does my shadow self-react when I am under stress?
What aspects of myself am I in denial about and how can I confront them?
